quiz.subtitle: Answer {{count}} quick questions — logic from golf-knowledge.
quiz.unknownBody: Go back and pick a category from the home screen.

p.drv-1: What is your typical driver carry pattern?
p.drv-2: How would you describe your swing speed with driver?
p.drv-3: What is your primary miss off the tee?
p.drv-4: What do you want most from a new driver?
p.fw-1: How do you usually hit fairway woods?
p.fw-2: Typical use case for your fairway wood?
p.fw-3: Preferred ball flight with fairway wood?
p.hy-1: Why are you considering a hybrid?
p.ir-1: How often do you strike irons purely?
p.wg-1: Firmness of your home course turf?

o.fw-1-o3: Mostly from tee on short holes

drv-forgiving.name: Atlas Max Launch Driver
drv-forgiving.blurb: High-MOI head and lightweight shaft package built to launch easily with tight dispersion on mishits.

drv-lowspin.name: Vertex Pro LD
drv-lowspin.blurb: Forward CG and compact shaping for players who strike up consistently and want a flatter, faster flight.

drv-draw.name: Fairway Finder X
drv-draw.blurb: Neutral-to-draw bias weighting with a forgiving face to straighten common slice patterns.

fw-high.name: Greenline HL 3W
fw-high.blurb: Shallow face and rails that help sweepers launch fairway woods from tight lies.

fw-compact.name: TourCraft 3+
fw-compact.blurb: Deeper face and compact footprint for players who hit down and want a penetrating flight.

fw-versatile.name: DualTrack 5W
fw-versatile.blurb: Middle loft option that splits the difference for long par-5 second shots.

hy-rescue.name: RescueOne 3H
hy-rescue.blurb: Iron-replacement shape with strong lofts and a confidence-inspiring offset profile.

hy-compact.name: ProSlot 2H
hy-compact.blurb: Compact hybrid for players who use it as a precision club off the tee or into par 5s.

hy-dual.name: GapMaster 4H
hy-dual.blurb: Gap filler between longest iron and fairway wood with neutral flight bias.

ir-gi.name: CavityMax 6–PW
ir-gi.blurb: Wide-soled cavity backs that elevate launch and reduce turf dig for inconsistent strikers.

ir-pd.name: SpeedLine Pro Combo
ir-pd.blurb: Players-distance construction with a cleaner look and strong ball speed across the face.

ir-blade.name: Heritage MB
ir-blade.blurb: Compact profile and minimal offset for skilled players who value shot shaping and feel.

wg-high.name: SandCraft 56° High Bounce
wg-high.blurb: Full sole and high bounce for soft turf and steep angles of attack.

wg-mid.name: VersaGrind 54°
wg-mid.blurb: Versatile grind for most conditions and open-face shots around the green.

wg-low.name: LinksLow 58°
wg-low.blurb: Low bounce for firm fairways and shallow swing paths.

pt-mallet.name: LineTrue Mallet
pt-mallet.blurb: Face-balanced mallet for minimal arc and maximum alignment assistance.

pt-mid.name: FlowMid 34"
pt-mid.blurb: Mid-mallet with moderate toe hang for slight inside-to-inside strokes.

pt-blade.name: Classic Toe 35"
pt-blade.blurb: Traditional blade with toe hang for players who gate the putter on an arc.

result.tail: Your answers emphasize {{tags}}, which aligns with this head’s design goals.
result.note: Illustrative pick based on golf-knowledge — not a substitute for a professional fitting.
result.noQuiz: No quiz answers found. Run the quiz again.
result.mismatch: Quiz data does not match this category.
